responsibilities: • conduct statutory, tax, internal, and concurrent audits   • lead audit planning, execution, and repor ting  • ensure compliance with auditing standards and icai guidelines   • build sector -specific audit expertise (banking, manufacturing, ngos)   • maintain audit quality, documentation, and peer review readiness   • develop long -term assurance relationships with clients
qualifications: • ca with audit and assurance experience   • strong understanding of auditing standards and risk assessment   • high ethical standards and professional judgment
